title: UiPath Project
description: Minimal schema for project.json (authoritative file). project.uiproj, bindings.json, and entry-points.json are optional companion files; their shapes live in $defs.
$comment: Root object = project.json. Companion file shapes in $defs — not referenced, documentation-only.

name.description: Project identifier. No spaces. Matches the folder/package name.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the project does.
examples: SAP entry of form-generated structured email data

projectVersion.description: Project semantic version (SemVer). Set by the developer, not Studio.

dependencies.description: NuGet package dependencies. Keys are package IDs; values are NuGet version range strings.

additionalProperties.description: NuGet version range. Exact pin = '[X.Y.Z]'. Range = '[X.Y.Z, )' etc.

modernBehavior.description: Modern Design Experience flag. true = Coded Automation / Modern Activities. false = Classic workflow canvas.

schemaVersion.description: project.json format version as defined by UiPath Studio.

projectId.description: Stable project identity GUID. Generated once by Studio on project creation.

main.description: Relative path to the main entry-point workflow file.

project_uiproj.$comment: Optional file: project.uiproj — legacy/IDE metadata. May not exist in all projects.
project_uiproj.description: Minimal project metadata for IDE tooling (MSBuild/VS integration). Subset of project.json.

bindings_json.$comment: Optional file: bindings.json — resource/connection bindings. May not exist or may have empty resources.
bindings_json.description: Resource binding declarations for Orchestrator connections (storage buckets, assets, queues).

resources.description: List of bound resources. Empty array when no bindings declared.

entry_points_json.$comment: Optional file: entry-points.json — formal entry-point contract for Orchestrator. May not exist in older projects. Has its own upstream $schema at https://cloud.uipath.com/draft/2024-12/entry-point.
entry_points_json.description: Machine-readable entry-point contract. Generated/updated by Studio when saving. Consumed by Orchestrator for argument discovery.

input.description: JSON Schema fragment describing input arguments.
